_meta.description: Decision-support policy for accounting recommendations with controls, reconciliations, and evidence confidence framing.

optionsFramework.name: baseline_vs_alternative
optionsFramework.uncertaintyPrompt: State known facts, unknowns, and confidence range.
optionsFramework.whatChangesMyMindPrompt: List concrete signals that would reverse the recommendation.

templates.name: two_option_recommendation
templates.whatChangesMyMind: If any top two risk signals materialize, downgrade recommendation one level.
templates.template: Options: {options}. Risks: {risks}. Evidence threshold: {evidence_threshold}. Uncertainty: {uncertainty}. What changes my mind: {what_changes_my_mind}.

templates.name: three_option_tradeoff
templates.whatChangesMyMind: Se qualquer um dos dois principais sinais de risco ocorrer, reduza a recomendacao em um nivel.
templates.template: Opcoes: {options}. Riscos: {risks}. Limiar de evidencia: {evidence_threshold}. Incerteza: {uncertainty}. O que muda minha opiniao: {what_changes_my_mind}.

rules.trigger: accounting compare request without second document
accounting query about reconciliation but gap not validated
accounting answer mixes open and closed periods
accounting numeric response with implicit currency conversion
accounting recommendation with weak evidence only
